option.name: notice
option.value: /* * ============================================================================= * Project : ${project.name} * File : ${file.fileName} * Created On : ${today.format("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm")} * Author : Wilson K Sam * Copyright : (c) ${today.year} Wilson K Sam * ============================================================================= * * Description: * This source file is part of a coding practice project created for learning, * experimentation, interview preparation, and demonstration of software * development concepts and best practices. * * Purpose: * - * Notes: * - * * ============================================================================= */
